payload.answer: Duplicate Slack event detected; no new memory should be committed.

entity_resolution.reason: This appears to be a duplicate delivery of the same Slack event ID, so no new durable entity resolution is needed.

memory_cards.statement: A Slack event about Sam from Goldman liking Bill Evans was delivered twice with the same event ID.

details: Same Slack event ID received twice.

repair_options: If a distinct later event exists, provide a different Slack event ID.
If the original message was edited, supply the edited event payload rather than the duplicate delivery.

raw_text: {"intent":"deduplicate_event","decision":"ignore_duplicate","memory_cards":[{"kind":"event","statement":"A Slack event about Sam from Goldman liking Bill Evans was delivered twice with the same event ID.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation"},{"name":"Bill Evans","type":"person","role":"mentioned"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"affiliated_with","object":"Goldman"},{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"likes","object":"Bill Evans"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"no_change","entity_id":null,"reason":"This appears to be a duplicate delivery of the same Slack event ID, so no new durable entity resolution is needed."},"conflict_classification":"duplicate_event","answer":"Duplicate Slack event detected; no new memory should be committed.","citations":["slack_retry_event_001"],"repair_options":["If a distinct later event exists, provide a different Slack event ID.","If the original message was edited, supply the edited event payload rather than the duplicate delivery."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Same Slack event ID received twice.","No additional durable memory committed."]}}
